name: Zombie Highway Car Game
description: Experience the thrill of high-speed racing blended with the intense challenge of zombie car game. Navigate through chaotic roads filled with undead hordes, where strategy, speed, and firepower are your keys to survival. One-Hand Control, Infinite Strategies: Easy-to-learn controls allow for a seamless gaming experience, while strategic choices in equipment and abilities offer depth and replayability.
instructions: Mouse click to turn car - To click any button use mouse
